upload.title: Upload
upload.formats: MP4, MP3, WAV, MOV, AVI, MKV, M4A, FLAC, OGG, WebM
upload.refine_model_hint: Used for refine, metadata, etc. Default from Settings.
upload.glossary_hint: Used to improve transcription accuracy. Format: term:reading
upload.enable_refine: LLM post-processing (fix proper nouns, punctuation, fillers)
upload.refine_verbatim_desc: Fix only misrecognized words. Keep fillers and sentence structure as-is
upload.refine_standard_desc: Fix errors + remove fillers. Keep sentence structure
upload.refine_caption_desc: Optimize for readable captions. Includes sentence completion and splitting
upload.enable_verify: Verify pass (re-check proper nouns & place names)
upload.enable_verify_desc: Re-read full transcript after refine to catch inconsistencies in names, kanji, and places
upload.persona_hint_youtuber: Configured for YouTubers — caption-mode refine enabled. Generate metadata after upload from History.
upload.persona_hint_meeting: Configured for meetings — verbatim refine keeps every word. Use the SRT editor for speaker labels.
upload.persona_hint_editor: Configured for editing — standard refine. Use the SRT editor's glossary and time-nudge after upload.

landing.title: Welcome
landing.hero_subtitle: Generate SRT files from video or audio with AI transcription, then refine, edit, and publish — all in one place.
landing.persona_youtuber_desc: Generate subtitles, metadata, catchphrases, and quizzes for your videos.
landing.persona_meeting_desc: Transcribe conversations with speaker labels and export per-speaker SRT.
landing.persona_editor_desc: AI-assisted editing with glossary, time nudge, and segment operations.
landing.getstarted_step1: Add an API key in Settings (OpenAI, Google, or both).
landing.getstarted_step2: Upload a media file and pick a refine mode.
landing.getstarted_step3: Edit subtitles, generate metadata, and download.

history.title: Upload History
history.heading: Upload History
history.delete_confirm: Delete this upload and all generated data?
history.no_jobs: No uploads yet. Upload a media file to get started.

settings.title: Settings
settings.ollama_desc: Connect to a local Ollama instance for LLM post-processing (refine, metadata, quiz). Transcription still uses OpenAI Whisper.
settings.preset_quality: Quality: gpt-5.4 + gemini-3.1-pro-preview — Best accuracy, highest cost
settings.preset_balanced: Balanced: gpt-5.4-mini + gemini-3-flash-preview — Good quality, reasonable cost
settings.default_models_desc: Used for metadata, catchphrase, quiz generation. Also used as fallback for refine.
settings.refine_models_hint: Override for SRT post-processing only. Leave empty to use default model above.
settings.pricing_desc: Cost per 1M tokens (USD). Used for cost dashboard calculations.
settings.glossary_desc: Register proper nouns, speaker names, and technical terms to improve LLM post-processing accuracy. One entry per line.
settings.refine_prompts_desc: Customize the LLM prompts used for each refine mode. Use {segments_json} and {glossary_section} as placeholders.
settings.tone_references_desc: Paste titles and descriptions from your previous YouTube videos. The AI will match their writing style when generating metadata.
settings.tone_references_placeholder:
---
Title: Video Title
Description: First few lines of the description...
---

meta.title: YouTube Metadata
meta.heading: YouTube Metadata
meta.channel_info_desc: Saved across sessions. Used by Optimize AI.
meta.additional_notes_placeholder: e.g., Past video description sample, style preferences...
meta.description_template_desc: Structure guide for generated descriptions. Included in the prompt.
meta.description_template_placeholder:
1. Hook (first 3 lines)
2. Chapter index (00:00 format)
3. Summary
4. Hashtags
meta.fixed_footer_desc: Always appended to the end of the description (links, SNS, etc). Not processed by AI.
meta.use_tone_ref: Match style with past YouTube posts

srt_editor.title: SRT Editor
srt_editor.glossary_hint: One entry per line. Use → for corrections (e.g. wrong → right). Saved per job.
srt_editor.merge_consecutive_only: Only consecutive segments can be merged.
srt_editor.exceeds_next: End time exceeds next segment's end

setup.title: Setup
setup.choose_provider: Choose your transcription provider to get started.
setup.openai_desc: Best accuracy for most languages. Requires an OpenAI API key.
setup.google_desc: Great for long files and multilingual content. Requires a Google API key.
setup.openai_key_hint: Get your key from platform.openai.com → API Keys
setup.google_key_hint: Get your key from aistudio.google.com → API Keys
setup.ready_desc: Your API key is verified. You can now upload audio/video files for transcription.
